creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: assign to maintainers of sysutils/u-boot-master .

To submitter: for safety, please resubmit u-boot-master.diff via diff -u.

Also, IWBNI the diff were submitted rooted at ports/ .  That way a reviewer could more easily tell that it was a diff for sysutils/u-boot-master/Makefile .
